name: Longos 13
description: The Varrio Longo 13 are the largest Sureño gang throughout the Harbor Area of Long Beach, California. The Longo 13 is made up of three sets: The East Side Longos (ESL13) which is the largest of the three, with an estimate of over 600 members. The second largest of the three are the West Side Longos (WSL13), with around 300 members, followed by the North Side Longos (NSL13).
